events.name: Couture Catwalk - Street Graffiti
events.marketing: Join the Runway once again this PJKT:Fest with Omega by AstrixZ & Show Off your 2026 PJKT Style & Drip! The theme this year is Street Graffiti! Let's show off our styles and colours!

Community.name: Omega
Community.description: An 18+ VRChat community dedicated to themed adventures, virtual fashion, creativity, and making genuine connections. Dress for the occasion, explore immersive experiences, meet new people, and celebrate individuality through unique events designed to keep VRChat fresh, inspiring, and fun. From Fashion Voyages & Runway Parties to Winter Balls and Creator Collaborations, Omega by AstrixZ is a place where self-expression and new experiences shine.

events.name: Lucid Multimedia Vtuber Meet and Greet
events.marketing: This meet & greet features VTubers from the American VTuber agency lucid Multimedia! Come get to know Neiomi Cielo, the astral wolf of lucid Multimedia, and her fellow agency mates as they visit PJKT for the first time ever!!

Community.name: Lucid Multimedia
Community.description:
lucid Multimedia is a US-based virtual entertainment talent agency that offers VTubers and digital content creators a dynamic platform to unleash their full creative potential. By "Expanding Horizons and Empowering Creativity", we strive to transform dreams into reality, enrich lives, and create positive, impactful experiences.

lucid Multimedia's mission is to democratize the business of the entertainment industry for content creators. We believe that artists affiliated with a company should have the right to freedom of speech and access to ethical business support.

events.name: Laserdome Games
events.marketing: Charge your batteries and grab a zapper because its time to battle in the Laserdome!

Community.name: xCirrex Media
Community.description: Monthly tournaments in xCirrex's PVP worlds, community hangouts and concerts!

events.name: Games With Comrades And Ops
events.marketing: Time to rock and roll! Join Comrades And Ops for our signature gaming event! We invite you to play two hours of high-capacity Quest-compatible games with us and enjoy all the madness and craziness of some of the funnest games on VRChat!

Community.name: Comrades and Ops
Community.description: Comrades And Ops is a gaming and social group which brings people together in the name of fun, good times, and friendship. Our signature event is Thursday Games, a 2-hour gaming session in VRChat held every Thursday at 6pm USA EST. We host and play various games outside of VRChat and encourage participation in major events throughout VRChat and other gaming communities. All members are invited to host their own gaming or social event. Time to rock and roll!

events.name: The Basics of VR Filmmaking
events.marketing: A half informative, half demonstrative panel showing the how-to's and where to start to get into VR filmmaking.

events.name: In between with Roger and Spencer
events.marketing: Come and join Spencer and Roger while they talk about the crazy, wacky virtual and real world we live in at the Spencer show!

Community.name: The Spencer Show
Community.description:
The Spencer Show
VRChats Wildest Variety Show!

Welcome to The Spencer Showǃǃ a VRChat variety Performance and Talk Show where pretty much anything can happen! From chaotic skits and cool dances to live music and live talk shows‚ this is a space built for performers and dancers who actually enjoy putting on a show and having fun while doing it․ 
What started as just a simple project on VRChat has gotten way bigger than I anticipated. The Spencer Show originally started as just a fun little skit thing between friends, but now it has gotten quite bigger. I, Spencerdude, the owner of the Spencer Show, take pride in entertaining our audiences with our little shows we do, and I'm proud to be here at Projekt.

events.name: Bump n' Bash: Round 2 with the Lead Developer!
events.marketing: Play with the developer of Bump n' Bash as you send your foes flying across soaring skies‚ erupting volcanoes‚ and even deep space with a well-timed punch in a platform fighter meets party gameǃ The more damage you take‚ the higher you're launchedǃ

events.name: Project Lockdown
events.marketing: The LPD is back on patrol across PJKT; our patrol squads will be eagerly searching the streets for the wrong doers of VRChat so our fellow communities may enjoy the night once again! We aim to fill our prison with the criminals we catch in the night.

Community.name: Local Police Department
Community.description:
Welcome the LPD, one of VRChats oldest and largest roleplaying groups bringing entertainment to public lobbies since 2018. The LPD hosts daily VRChat events where officers are assigned to a squad to create roleplay scenarios in public lobbies, themed around interactions with the public and emergency services. Due to the nature of improv, anything can happen during these events. From drug busts and shootouts, to checking mirror dwelling licenses. 

To join the LPD check out the recruitment channel on our Discord at <color=#7289daff>discord.gg/lpd</color>. There you will find the application form as well as our handbook which is packed with all kinds of important information. Once accepted you will go through cadet training, before jumping into patrolling VRChat as an official LPD officer. When you have some experience under your belt you can take additional training to move up the ranks or specialize into other kinds of roleplay that we offer.

Patrol officers will arrest people and bring them to the LPD station to take their mugshot that then gets posted on our discord server for everyone to see. If they choose to not come quietly we have our swat team, known as SLRT, to help persuade them. Once the suspect has been processed they will be handed over to our Corrections Officers and given a nice new home in the LPD Prison with all the other prisoners. And if anyone gets hurt in the process they can be treated by the LMT at our Hospital. To find out how you can help keep the streets of VRChat safe, join our Discord or follow us on Twitter @LPD_vr.

events.name: How To Not Get Scammed Online
events.marketing: Don't be the next victim of an online scam! Join Commander A9 for his presentation on the various online scams specifically targeting Discord and Telegram servers, and especially members of the furry community. Real-world examples will be provided. No experience necessary! Come as you are and get ready to learn!

events.name: VR Feud
events.marketing: Wanna put your VRChat knowledge to the test? Challenge yourself along with Sayho, Vomori, Melty and Shura in this show where all languages are welcome!

events.name: About BUDDYWORKS: From Idea to Mission
events.marketing: Buddy from BUDDYWORKS showing off his work, and talking about the ups and downs of becoming a creator.

Community.name: BUDDYWORKS
Community.description:
BUDDYWORKS is a community by creators for creators, helping and educating in all things unity and blender with VRC context.

Everyone is happily invited to join in, every skill level, even just slight curiosity.

Maybe you find the spark. ❤️

events.name: MEMORIA a VRChat Film
events.marketing: Santi is a film student in Madrid. He's here to present his first VRChat film he worked on for his university thesis and how was the journey like to start Filming in VRChat without knowing anyone and making a research work out of it.

events.name: Virtual Gauntlet PJKT Game Event!
events.marketing: Join us for an unforgettable experience at PJKT! We're bringing the heat with the Virtual Gauntlet PJKT Game Event! Whether you're here to compete, cheer, or just soak in the vibes, this is the one session you don't want to miss. Come through and be part of the movement!

Community.name: The Virtual Gauntlet
Community.description: The Virtual Gauntlet is a VR game show hosted in VRChat where two teams of four compete in fast-paced, skill-based obstacle course challenges. The show runs in seasons with a strong cyberpunk theme and features unique games like Dodge Wall, Rift Rush, and Grid Lock. We record and stream the matches, promote the teams involved, and offer in-world prizes like trophies and group shoutouts. It's built to spotlight player communities, bring hype energy to VR gaming, and create something exciting for both players and viewers.

events.name: Kochō no Boss Rush
events.marketing:
"Kochō no Boss Rush" is an immersive roleplay workshop! 
The event aims to engage and train the public in the art of fighting and roleplaying, specifically centered on epic boss encounters that are common within the community. It offers participants a unique opportunity to learn combat techniques, enhance their roleplaying skills, and then put their newly acquired abilities to the test in a thrilling boss scenario!

Community.name: Kochō no Yakuza
Community.description:
We are a roleplay VRChat community themed after the Yakuza game series and Japanese culture in general. We wish to provide, bring together and entertain. 

Providing a friendlier place for VRChat public to roleplay in is one of the aims we wish to achieve, alongside with helping other communities with bigger projects.

Bringing together both new and veteran players who have nowhere else to go, educate people about VRChat as a whole and keeping them up to date on what is going on in this vast but confusing place.

Entertaining both the public and our own people with external and internal roleplay which are still in development. Giving people a place to feel welcomed and a place anybody can feel they belong to.

events.name: Super Xavier's Social Media Algorithm's class
events.marketing: Super Xavier will be teaching about social media algorithms, covering TikTok, YouTube, and Instagram. explaining how they work, building on ideas by empowering your current content as a library of knowledge, amazing tools to help, learning from your analytics to continue improving your content, and much more!

events.name: VIRTUAL MARKET explores Projekt Fest!
events.marketing: TBA

Community.name: Virtual Market
Community.description:
"One of world's largest VR events - a virtual exhibition of 3D avatars and assets, physical products (fashion, PCs, food products, etc.) on the metaverse

*The Guinness World Record™ was achieved for having ""most booths at a virtual reality market event""."

events.name: Kuda's FBT Dancing
events.marketing: Feel free to dance along with Kuda's FBT Dancing performance! Good tunes and fun vibes.

Community.name: Kudalyn's Creations
Community.description:
Hi! I'm Kuda, and I make customizable furry models for VRChat, along with various clothing and other accessories for them. I also host once a month meetups for my avatar community, so folks can show off what they've been working on, and bring their friends along to chill! 

You can find my storefronts at Jinxxy and Gumroad. If you search 'Kudalyn's Creations' in the Worlds section of VRChat to find my avatar world, with many more public avatars to browse! 

You can also find more info and more links at my website at Kudalyn.com!

events.name: Let's Drive, in Cyber City!
events.marketing: Hang Out & Explore a Massive City Inspired by the Cyberpunk Genre!

Community.name: Danger Noodle Animations
Community.description: A cyberpunk shop for cell shaded assets. We're a small group of friends working on fan animation and props to sell.

events.name: Improv Knight Improv Show
events.marketing: Improv Knight does improv! Who would've thought?

Community.name: Improv Knight
Community.description:
At Improv Knight‚ we aim to teach the techniques of improvisation to the beautiful people of VR Chat who are willing to learn‚ and improve․

We also host shows once a month and have weekly workshopsǃ

We embrace the awkward moments‚ and turn them into gems through trial and error․

events.name: Failed to Render Presents: PJKT FEST Special
events.marketing: VRChat's longest-running pro comedy club, Failed to Render, takes the stage at PJKT: Fest 2026! Expect a night of live stand-up, unhinged moments, and many many laughs.

Community.name: Failed to Render
Community.description: Failed to Render Comedy Club is the longest-standing professional comedy club in virtual reality, every Monday, Wednesday, and Thursday in VRChat!

events.name: VRDA Dance Class
events.marketing: Step into the world of ballroom—join DustBunny and learn to dance with a partner in a fun, welcoming class.

Community.name: VR Dance Academy
Community.description: For those who are interested in VR Ballroom Dance Classes ＆ Social Dancing Eventsǃ

events.name: A day on Base with the Waifuwehr
events.marketing: An engaging and exciting look into the life of a Waifuwehr solider, join us for an experience like no other. Come and see the highs of the life of a paratroopers. Experience the arsenal of weapons, fire off some rounds, blow some shit up, and have a good time! AUX WELLT!

Community.name: Waifuwehr
Community.description: We are the Waifuwehr! VRChat's oldest still surviving Military RP community founded back in 2017. The community aims to offer a realistic, dynamic, and educational military experience to those belonging to cultures worldwide, all connected under one organization, regardless of one’s personal background.

events.name: Yume Maid Café
events.marketing: Welcome to Yume Maid Cafe. Where Dreams Come to Life!

events.name: Skits'n'Bits x PJKT Fest Improv Show
events.marketing: In an improv show, we have a show host and six performers delivering an improv performance with many games to an audience.

Community.name: Skits'N'Bits
Community.description: We're a creative‚ fun‚ and welcoming improv community offering weekly workshops for all skill levels 18 and older and serve as a hub for skits‚ sketches, projects‚ and other VR performative collabsǃ

events.name: VR Space Museum "Cosmoria" English Tour
events.marketing:
A two-part tour of a Japanese VR space museum world, led by the museum's primary English translation maintainer and a NASA engineer who works on the Artemis program.

This museum showcases all sorts of detailed models and displays related to rocketry, spacecraft, space science, and astrophysics, so you won't want to miss a tour led by people who actually know what they're talking about!

events.name: The importance of marketing in asset creation
events.marketing: DX is going to discuss how important marketing is and present general strategies on how to do it.

events.name: Improv Workshop
events.marketing: In an improv workshop we're going to teach people the basics of improv for people of all skill-levels.

Community.name: Skits'N'Bits
Community.description: We're a creative‚ fun‚ and welcoming improv community offering weekly workshops for all skill levels 18 and older and serve as a hub for skits‚ sketches, projects‚ and other VR performative collabsǃ

events.name: Get Fit With Soaring Fitness
events.marketing:
Soaring Fitness is a community-driven fitness program operated by Hack Your Lives, a registered 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization, dedicated to making health and wellness freely accessible to everyone.

Through innovative virtual reality experiences and online streaming, Soaring Fitness brings people together from around the world to get active, stay healthy, and support one another, no gym required.

Community.name: Soaring Fitness
Community.description: We are a VR-based workout group, focused on being freely accessible. Our hard working team of Volunteers offer their time and experience to make it all possible. Our Certified Personal Trainers work with our Volunteer Instructors to bring you workouts 7 days a week! We believe good health and fitness should not be gated behind a paywall!

events.name: Blood Ravens Tactical Skirmish
events.marketing: Two team will be going head to head in a PvP Team Deathmatch! Models and instructions will be provided.

Community.name: The Blood Ravens
Community.description: The Blood Ravens are a multi-purpose PVP community and social hub, One of the oldest still running Warhammer Community on VR Chat. Events are hosted regularly by the week, participating in world hops, PVP matches with other Warhammer communities, Laserdome tournaments, game nights, and more. Our leadership team is friendly and active with a large playerbase and many regulars. We welcome any and all to participate and enjoy the community we've grown.

events.name: VRC Avatar Collection - Meet the Avatar Creator
events.marketing:
VRC Avatar Collection (VAC) is a project that originated in Japan, dedicated to showcasing the appeal of VRChat avatars and fashion through events, videos, magazines, and merchandise.
For PJKT, we're hosting an AMA and Meet the Avatar Creator session featuring a VRChat avatar artist! Come discover the latest trends in avatar fashion with VAC.
(Creator to be announced.)

events.name: Creepypasta Storytime
events.marketing: Gather round the campfire boils and ghouls and MrCreepyPasta will tell you stories that will give you nightmares for years to come. Taken from stories around the internet and some of your favorites from YouTube, listen as the one and only blue man retells them in the iconic voice you've come to know and love.

events.name: SpokenHeart
events.marketing: Poetry and Short Story Event - Respectful Open Mic event to spread poetry and stories of your own as well as of other artists (with quoting their name) in a relaxed and save atmosphere.

events.name: CookieSquad Collaborative
events.marketing: Colaborative of 5 DJs over 5 Hours.
